mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (username, nickname, role, password) VALUES (#{username}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{password})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user SET password = #{password} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, username, nickname, role, password, create_time AS createTime FROM t_user WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY user_id ASC
